recommendations.title: Esterno Notte (part I)
recommendations.overview: The 1978 kidnapping and assassination of former Italian Prime Minister Aldo Moro by Red Brigades terrorists.

recommendations.title: Good Morning, Night
recommendations.overview: The 1978 kidnapping and murder of Aldo Moro, president of the most important political party in Italy at the time, Democrazia Cristiana, as seen from the perspective of one of his assailants -- a conflicted young woman in the ranks of the Red Brigade

recommendations.title: The Imitation Game
recommendations.overview: Based on the real life story of legendary cryptanalyst Alan Turing, the film portrays the nail-biting race against time by Turing and his brilliant team of code-breakers at Britain's top-secret Government Code and Cypher School at Bletchley Park, dur

recommendations.title: Colonia
recommendations.overview: A young woman's desperate search for her abducted boyfriend draws her into the infamous Colonia Dignidad, a sect nobody ever escaped from.

recommendations.title: Outlaws - For Greater Glory
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the Cristeros War (1926-1929), which was touched off by a rebellion against the Mexican government's attempt to secularize the country.

recommendations.title: Gods
recommendations.overview: Set in communist Poland of the 80s the movie depicts early career of cardio surgeon Zbigniew Religa.

recommendations.title: Diaz - Don't Clean Up This Blood
recommendations.overview: On July 19–21, 2001, over 200,000 people took to the streets of Genoa to protest against the ongoing G8 summit. Anti-globalization activists clashed with the police, with 23-year-old protester Carlo Giuliani shot dead after confronting a police vehic

recommendations.title: Salvatore Giuliano
recommendations.overview: Sicilian bandit Salvatore Giuliano's bullet-riddled corpse is found facedown in a courtyard in Castelvetrano, a handgun and rifle by his side. Local and international press descend upon the scene, hoping to crack open the true story behind the death

recommendations.title: Fortress of War
recommendations.overview: The film covers the heroic defence of the Brest Fortress, which was attacked during the first strike of German invaders on June 22 1941. The story describes the events of the first days of the defence, including the three main resistance zones, heade

recommendations.title: Santiago, Italia
recommendations.overview: After the coup d'État of the Democratic government of Allende, the embassy of Italy in Santiago played a major role in helping the opposers of the regime, and extradited many of them to Italy.
